title: Stackable Potions + Stackable duration time
description: Stack any vanilla Potions and unlimited time duration (beacons have cap of 10 mins)
body:
be able to stack any vanilla potions into a stack of 16x and also be able to stack duration time of all potions however beacons are cap to 10 minute to stop abuse


commands for op players

/beaconcap on

/beaconcap off

/beaconcap toggle

/beaconcap status
